org.key_project.util.java

Class CollectionUtil

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.java.CollectionUtil

  • public class CollectionUtil
extends Object
    Provides static methods to work with Collections.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static String SEPARATOR
      The default separator.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      private CollectionUtil()
      Forbid instances by this private constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static <T> void addAll(Collection<T> collection, Iterable<T> iterable)
      Adds all elements to the Collection.
      static <T> void addAll(Collection<T> collection, T... elementsToAdd)
      Adds all elements to the Collection.
      static <T> List<T> arrayToList(T[] array)
      Converts the given array to a new List.
      static <T> void binaryInsert(List<T> list, T toInsert, Comparator<T> comparator)
      Performs a binary insert on the given sorted List.
      static <T> boolean contains(Iterable<T> iterable, T element)
      Checks if the given element is contained in the given Iterable.
      static <T> boolean containsSame(Collection<T> first, Collection<T> second)
      Checks if the given two Collections contains the same elements in any order.
      static <T> int count(Iterable<T> iterable, IFilter<T> filter)
      Counts the number of elements in the given Iterable which are selected by the given IFilter.
      static <T> T getFirst(Iterable<T> iterable)
      Returns the first element from the given Iterable.
      static <T> int indexOf(Iterator<T> iter, T toSearch)
      Returns the index of the element to search in the given iterator.
      static boolean isEmpty(Collection<?> collection)
      Nullpointersave execution of Collection.isEmpty().
      static boolean isEmpty(Map<?,?> map)
      Nullpointersave execution of Map.isEmpty().
      static <T> boolean removeAll(Collection<T> collection, T... elementsToRemove)
      Removes all elements from the Collection.
      static <T> boolean removeComplete(Collection<T> collection, T toRemove)
      Removes all occurrences of the element in the given Collection.
      static <T> T removeFirst(Iterable<T> iterable)
      Removes the first element from the given Iterable.
      static <T> T search(Iterable<T> iterable, IFilter<T> filter)
      Searches an element in the given Iterable instance.
      static <T> List<T> searchAll(Iterable<T> iterable, IFilter<T> filter)
      Searches all elements accepted by the given IFilter.
      static <T> T searchAndRemove(Iterable<T> iterable, IFilter<T> filter)
      Searches an element in the given Iterable instance and removes the found element from it.
      static <T,E extends Throwable>
      T      		 searchAndRemoveWithException(Iterable<T> iterable, IFilterWithException<T,E> filter)
      Searches an element in the given Iterable instance and removes the found element from it.
      static <T> List<T> toList(T... objects)
      Converts the given objects into a List.
      static <T> Set<T> toSet(T... objects)
      Converts the given objects into a Set.
      static String toString(Collection<?> collection)
      Converts the Collection into a String.
      static String toString(Collection<?> collection, String separator)
      Converts the Collection into a String and uses the defined separator to separate elements.

        public static final String SEPARATOR
        The default separator.

    • Constructor Detail

      • CollectionUtil

        private CollectionUtil()
        Forbid instances by this private constructor.

    • Method Detail

      • indexOf

        public static <T> int indexOf(Iterator<T> iter,
                              T toSearch)
        Returns the index of the element to search in the given iterator.
        Parameters:
        iter - The iterator to search in.
        toSearch - The element to search.
        Returns:
        The index of the element or -1 if it was not found.

      • toString

        public static String toString(Collection<?> collection)
        Converts the Collection into a String.
        Parameters:
        collection - The Collection to convert.
        Returns:
        The Collection as String.

      • toString

        public static String toString(Collection<?> collection,
                              String separator)
        Converts the Collection into a String and uses the defined separator to separate elements.
        Parameters:
        collection - The Collection to convert.
        separator - The separator between elements.
        Returns:
        The Collection as String.

      • isEmpty

        public static boolean isEmpty(Collection<?> collection)
        Nullpointersave execution of Collection.isEmpty().
        Parameters:
        collection - The given Collection.
        Returns:
        true = is empty or null, false = is not empty.

      • isEmpty

        public static boolean isEmpty(Map<?,?> map)
        Nullpointersave execution of Map.isEmpty().
        Parameters:
        map - The given Map.
        Returns:
        true = is empty or null, false = is not empty.

      • toList

        public static <T> List<T> toList(T... objects)
        Converts the given objects into a List.
        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the objects.
        Parameters:
        objects - The objects array to convert.
        Returns:
        The created List.

      • toSet

        public static <T> Set<T> toSet(T... objects)
        Converts the given objects into a Set.
        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the objects.
        Parameters:
        objects - The objects array to convert.
        Returns:
        The created Set.

      • addAll

        public static <T> void addAll(Collection<T> collection,
                              T... elementsToAdd)
        Adds all elements to the Collection.
        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the Collections elements.
        Parameters:
        collection - The Collection to add to.
        elementsToAdd - The elements to add.

      • addAll

        public static <T> void addAll(Collection<T> collection,
                              Iterable<T> iterable)
        Adds all elements to the Collection.
        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the Collections elements.
        Parameters:
        collection - The Collection to add to.
        elementsToAdd - The elements to add.

      • removeAll

        public static <T> boolean removeAll(Collection<T> collection,
                                    T... elementsToRemove)
        Removes all elements from the Collection.
        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the Collections elements.
        Parameters:
        collection - The Collection to remove from.
        elementsToRemove - The elements to remove.
        Returns:
        true if the Collection changed as result of this call.

      • removeComplete

        public static <T> boolean removeComplete(Collection<T> collection,
                                         T toRemove)
        Removes all occurrences of the element in the given Collection.
        Parameters:
        collection - The Collection to remove from.
        toRemove - The element to remove.
        Returns:
        true if at least one element was removed, false if the Collection was not modified.

      • searchAll

        public static <T> List<T> searchAll(Iterable<T> iterable,
                                    IFilter<T> filter)
        Searches all elements accepted by the given IFilter.
        Parameters:
        iterable - The Iterable to search in.
        filter - The IFilter to use.
        Returns:
        The elements accepted by the given IFilter.

      • search

        public static <T> T search(Iterable<T> iterable,
                           IFilter<T> filter)
        Searches an element in the given Iterable instance.
        Parameters:
        iterable - The instance to search in.
        filter - The filter to select an element.
        Returns:
        The found element or null if no element was found.

      • searchAndRemove

        public static <T> T searchAndRemove(Iterable<T> iterable,
                                    IFilter<T> filter)
        Searches an element in the given Iterable instance and removes the found element from it.
        Parameters:
        iterable - The instance to search in.
        filter - The filter to select an element.
        Returns:
        The found element or null if no element was found.

      • searchAndRemoveWithException

        public static <T,E extends Throwable> T searchAndRemoveWithException(Iterable<T> iterable,
                                                                     IFilterWithException<T,E> filter)
                                                              throws E extends Throwable
        Searches an element in the given Iterable instance and removes the found element from it.
        Parameters:
        iterable - The instance to search in.
        filter - The filter to select an element.
        Returns:
        The found element or null if no element was found.
        Throws:
        E extends Throwable

      • contains

        public static <T> boolean contains(Iterable<T> iterable,
                                   T element)
        Checks if the given element is contained in the given Iterable.
        Parameters:
        iterable - The given Iterable to search in.
        element - The element to search.
        Returns:
        true = contained, false = not contained

      • count

        public static <T> int count(Iterable<T> iterable,
                            IFilter<T> filter)
        Counts the number of elements in the given Iterable which are selected by the given IFilter.
        Parameters:
        iterable - The elements to count in.
        filter - The IFilter to select elements.
        Returns:
        The number of elements selected by the IFilter in the given Iterable.

      • containsSame

        public static <T> boolean containsSame(Collection<T> first,
                                       Collection<T> second)

        Checks if the given two Collections contains the same elements in any order.

        Empty Collections and null parameters are treated as equal.

        Parameters:
        first - The first Collection.
        second - The second Collection.
        Returns:
        true both Collections contains same elements, false Collections are different.

      • getFirst

        public static <T> T getFirst(Iterable<T> iterable)
        Returns the first element from the given Iterable.
        Parameters:
        iterable - The Iterable to get first element from.
        Returns:
        The first element or null if no element is available.

      • removeFirst

        public static <T> T removeFirst(Iterable<T> iterable)
        Removes the first element from the given Iterable.
        Parameters:
        iterable - The Iterable to remove first element from.
        Returns:
        The removed first element or null if no element was removed.

      • arrayToList

        public static <T> List<T> arrayToList(T[] array)
        Converts the given array to a new List.
        Parameters:
        array - to be converted.
        Returns:
        the new List containing all array elements.

      • binaryInsert

        public static <T> void binaryInsert(List<T> list,
                                    T toInsert,
                                    Comparator<T> comparator)
        Performs a binary insert on the given sorted List.
        Parameters:
        list - The sorted List to insert in.
        toInsert - The element to insert.
        comparator - The Comparator to use.
